homeHeroQuote0.en: Every day forward is a win.
homeHeroQuote0.desc: Rotating daily hero line on the home Serenity card (1 of 50).

homeHeroQuote1.en: Progress is built in days like this.
homeHeroQuote1.desc: Rotating daily hero line on the home Serenity card (2 of 50).

homeHeroQuote2.desc: Rotating daily hero line on the home Serenity card (3 of 50).

homeHeroQuote3.desc: Rotating daily hero line on the home Serenity card (4 of 50).

homeHeroQuote4.desc: Rotating daily hero line on the home Serenity card (5 of 50).

homeHeroQuote5.en: Each day is a brick in the wall.
homeHeroQuote5.desc: Rotating daily hero line on the home Serenity card (6 of 50).

homeHeroQuote6.desc: Rotating daily hero line on the home Serenity card (7 of 50).

homeHeroQuote7.desc: Rotating daily hero line on the home Serenity card (8 of 50).

homeHeroQuote11.desc: Rotating daily hero line on the home Serenity card (12 of 50).

homeHeroQuote12.desc: Rotating daily hero line on the home Serenity card (13 of 50).

homeHeroQuote13.desc: Rotating daily hero line on the home Serenity card (14 of 50).

homeHeroQuote14.en: The next right choice is the whole game.
homeHeroQuote14.desc: Rotating daily hero line on the home Serenity card (15 of 50).

homeHeroQuote15.desc: Rotating daily hero line on the home Serenity card (16 of 50).

homeHeroQuote16.desc: Rotating daily hero line on the home Serenity card (17 of 50).

homeHeroQuote17.en: You did the hard thing today.
homeHeroQuote17.desc: Rotating daily hero line on the home Serenity card (18 of 50).

homeHeroQuote18.desc: Rotating daily hero line on the home Serenity card (19 of 50).

homeHeroQuote19.desc: Rotating daily hero line on the home Serenity card (20 of 50).

homeHeroQuote20.desc: Rotating daily hero line on the home Serenity card (21 of 50).

homeHeroQuote21.desc: Rotating daily hero line on the home Serenity card (22 of 50).

homeHeroQuote22.en: Sobriety is the work and the reward.
homeHeroQuote22.desc: Rotating daily hero line on the home Serenity card (23 of 50).

homeHeroQuote23.en: What you do daily defines you.
homeHeroQuote23.desc: Rotating daily hero line on the home Serenity card (24 of 50).

homeHeroQuote24.en: Hours add to days. Days add to years.
homeHeroQuote24.desc: Rotating daily hero line on the home Serenity card (25 of 50).

homeHeroQuote25.desc: Rotating daily hero line on the home Serenity card (26 of 50).

homeHeroQuote26.en: The first hard choice is behind you.
homeHeroQuote26.desc: Rotating daily hero line on the home Serenity card (27 of 50).

homeHeroQuote27.en: You're not who you were yesterday.
homeHeroQuote27.desc: Rotating daily hero line on the home Serenity card (28 of 50).

homeHeroQuote28.desc: Rotating daily hero line on the home Serenity card (29 of 50).

homeHeroQuote29.desc: Rotating daily hero line on the home Serenity card (30 of 50).

homeHeroQuote30.desc: Rotating daily hero line on the home Serenity card (31 of 50).

homeHeroQuote31.desc: Rotating daily hero line on the home Serenity card (32 of 50).

homeHeroQuote32.desc: Rotating daily hero line on the home Serenity card (33 of 50).

homeHeroQuote33.desc: Rotating daily hero line on the home Serenity card (34 of 50).

homeHeroQuote34.en: Days like this are how it changes.
homeHeroQuote34.desc: Rotating daily hero line on the home Serenity card (35 of 50).

homeHeroQuote35.desc: Rotating daily hero line on the home Serenity card (36 of 50).

homeHeroQuote36.desc: Rotating daily hero line on the home Serenity card (37 of 50).

homeHeroQuote37.desc: Rotating daily hero line on the home Serenity card (38 of 50).

homeHeroQuote38.desc: Rotating daily hero line on the home Serenity card (39 of 50).

homeHeroQuote39.desc: Rotating daily hero line on the home Serenity card (40 of 50).

homeHeroQuote40.desc: Rotating daily hero line on the home Serenity card (41 of 50).

homeHeroQuote41.desc: Rotating daily hero line on the home Serenity card (42 of 50).

homeHeroQuote42.desc: Rotating daily hero line on the home Serenity card (43 of 50).

homeHeroQuote43.desc: Rotating daily hero line on the home Serenity card (44 of 50).

homeHeroQuote44.en: You're not starting over. You're continuing.
homeHeroQuote44.desc: Rotating daily hero line on the home Serenity card (45 of 50).

homeHeroQuote45.desc: Rotating daily hero line on the home Serenity card (46 of 50).

homeHeroQuote46.desc: Rotating daily hero line on the home Serenity card (47 of 50).

homeHeroQuote47.desc: Rotating daily hero line on the home Serenity card (48 of 50).

homeHeroQuote48.en: Decision by decision. Day by day.
homeHeroQuote48.desc: Rotating daily hero line on the home Serenity card (49 of 50).

homeHeroQuote49.desc: Rotating daily hero line on the home Serenity card (50 of 50).

homeRecoveryBody0.en: Your body begins adjusting. Hydration and rest are your allies right now.
homeRecoveryBody0.desc: Short healing-timeline body text on the home recovery banner for the 12-hour milestone.

homeRecoveryBody1.en: Heart rate and sleep patterns may begin to shift as your body finds its rhythm.
homeRecoveryBody1.desc: Short healing-timeline body text on the home recovery banner for the 24-hour milestone.

homeRecoveryBody2.en: A significant window — be patient with yourself. Seek support if anything feels unsafe.
homeRecoveryBody2.desc: Short healing-timeline body text on the home recovery banner for the 48-hour milestone.

homeRecoveryBody3.en: The most intense early adjustment may begin to ease. A small window of calm can emerge.
homeRecoveryBody3.desc: Short healing-timeline body text on the home recovery banner for the 3-day milestone.

homeRecoveryBody4.en: Restorative sleep often begins to return. Vivid dreams can be a sign of deep repair.
homeRecoveryBody4.desc: Short healing-timeline body text on the home recovery banner for the 1-week milestone.

homeRecoveryBody5.en: Physical stamina may begin to return. Concentration and memory are beginning to sharpen.
homeRecoveryBody5.desc: Short healing-timeline body text on the home recovery banner for the 2-week milestone.

homeRecoveryBody6.en: Many people describe a sense of physical relief settling in around this point.
homeRecoveryBody6.desc: Short healing-timeline body text on the home recovery banner for the 1-month milestone.

homeRecoveryBody7.en: Day-to-day satisfaction may slowly start to feel more accessible again.
homeRecoveryBody7.desc: Short healing-timeline body text on the home recovery banner for the 3-month milestone.

homeRecoveryBody8.en: Many people notice a steadier baseline. Urges may become less frequent and easier to move through.
homeRecoveryBody8.desc: Short healing-timeline body text on the home recovery banner for the 6-month milestone.

homeRecoveryBody9.en: For many people, the long-term load on sleep, energy, and mood begins to ease at this point.
homeRecoveryBody9.desc: Short healing-timeline body text on the home recovery banner for the 1-year milestone.

homeRecoveryBody10.en: The space you have created can continue to deepen over time — one ordinary day at a time.
homeRecoveryBody10.desc: Short healing-timeline body text on the home recovery banner for the 2-years-and-beyond milestone.

homeRecoveryJustStarting.desc: Recovery banner current-stage label shown before the first (12-hour) milestone is reached.

homeRecoveryJustStartingBody.en: The decision you made today already matters. Be gentle with yourself.
homeRecoveryJustStartingBody.desc: Recovery banner body shown before the first milestone is reached.

homeRecoveryNow.desc: Recovery banner relative-time phrase: the next milestone is reached right now.

homeRecoveryInMin.desc: Recovery banner countdown: time until next milestone, in minutes.

homeRecoveryInHrs.desc: Recovery banner countdown: time until next milestone, in hours.

homeRecoveryInDays.desc: Recovery banner countdown: time until next milestone, in days.

homeHealingTimelineHeader.desc: Uppercase header on the home recovery/healing-timeline banner card.

homeRecoveryNext.desc: Recovery banner: label of the next milestone, e.g. 'Next: 1 Week'.

homeRecoveryAllMilestones.en: You have reached every milestone. Remarkable.
homeRecoveryAllMilestones.desc: Recovery banner line shown once every healing milestone has been reached.

homeMilestoneNode5Label.desc: Journey timeline node label for the 180-day milestone (sentence case).

homeMilestoneNode6Label.desc: Journey timeline node label for the 365-day milestone (sentence case).

homeGreetingName.desc: Home header greeting using the user's first name.

homeStartsIn.desc: Uppercase caption above the live counter when the quit date is in the future (counting down).

homeTimeSober.desc: Uppercase caption above the live counter when counting time elapsed since the sober date.

homeCounterDays.desc: Uppercase unit label under the days digit in the live home counter.

homeCounterHours.desc: Uppercase unit label under the hours digit in the live home counter.

homeCounterMinutes.desc: Uppercase unit label under the minutes digit in the live home counter.

homeCounterSeconds.desc: Uppercase unit label under the seconds digit in the live home counter.

homeMilestoneTimingStart.desc: Journey card timing caption for the day-0 milestone node.

homeMilestoneTimingDay.desc: Journey card timing caption for an unreached milestone under one year, e.g. 'Day 30'.

homeMilestoneTimingOneYear.desc: Journey card timing caption for the 365-day milestone node.

homeMilestoneTimingYears.desc: Journey card timing caption for a multi-year milestone node, e.g. '2 yr'.

homeJourneyProgressComplete.desc: Journey card progress-bar caption shown once the final milestone is reached.

homeJourneyDaysTo.desc: Journey card progress-bar caption: days remaining until the next milestone, e.g. '5 days to one week'. {label} is the lowercased next-milestone name.

homeIntentionTitle.desc: Title on the home daily-intention card.

homeIntentionPrompt.en: One small thing for your recovery today.
homeIntentionPrompt.desc: Subtitle inviting the user to set today's intention on the home intention card.

homeIntentionReviewPrompt.desc: Evening-review prompt label on the home intention card after 4pm.

homeIntentionOutcomeDid.desc: Home intention card outcome blurb when the user marked the intention as done. Keep the leading checkmark.

homeIntentionOutcomePartly.desc: Home intention card outcome blurb when partly done. Keep the leading tilde.

homeIntentionOutcomeNotYet.en: … Not yet — tomorrow is a new day.
homeIntentionOutcomeNotYet.desc: Home intention card outcome blurb when not yet done. Keep the leading ellipsis.

homeCravingHaltQuestion.en: Right now, are you any of these?
homeCravingHaltQuestion.desc: Section label above the HALT (hungry/angry/lonely/tired) chips in the log-a-craving sheet.

homeCravingHaltBlurb.en: Naming it slows the wave down — H.A.L.T.
homeCravingHaltBlurb.desc: Helper caption under the HALT chips in the log-a-craving sheet. H.A.L.T. is an acronym.

homeCravingOutcomeQuestion.desc: Section label above the outcome pills in the log-a-craving sheet.

homeCravingOutcomeStayedSober.desc: Outcome pill in the log-a-craving sheet: the user stayed sober.

homeCravingOutcomeUnclear.desc: Outcome pill in the log-a-craving sheet: outcome was unclear.

homeCravingOutcomeSlipped.desc: Outcome pill in the log-a-craving sheet: the user slipped.

homeLastTimeOutcomeSober.desc: Clause inserted into the 'last time' craving hint when the prior similar craving ended in staying sober.

homeLastTimeOutcomeSlipped.en: and you slipped — useful to know
homeLastTimeOutcomeSlipped.desc: Clause inserted into the 'last time' craving hint when the prior similar craving ended in a slip.

homeLastTimeDuration.desc: Parenthetical inserted into the 'last time' craving hint giving how long the prior craving lasted. Keep the leading space.

homeLastTimeBlurb.en: Last time around this level you {response}{duration} {outcome}.
homeLastTimeBlurb.desc: Personal 'last time' hint in the craving sheet. {response} is a lowercased response verb phrase, {duration} is an optional parenthetical, {outcome} is an optional outcome clause.

homeThoughtSavedPrivately.desc: Snackbar confirmation after saving a thought log.

homeThoughtSaveError.desc: Snackbar shown when saving a thought log fails.

homeThoughtWriteHintOptional.en: Write the thought in your own words (optional).
homeThoughtWriteHintOptional.desc: Text field hint in the log-a-thought sheet (optional variant).

homeActivityTypeRun.desc: Activity-type chip label in the log-activity sheet.

homeActivityTypeCycle.desc: Activity-type chip label in the log-activity sheet.

homeActivityTypeSwim.desc: Activity-type chip label in the log-activity sheet.

homeActivityTypeGym.desc: Activity-type chip label in the log-activity sheet.

homeActivityTimeDistance.desc: Section label for the time + distance inputs in the log-activity sheet (distance-based activities).

homeActivityDurationMin.desc: Field label above the minutes input for distance-based activities in the log-activity sheet.

homeActivityDistanceLabel.desc: Field label above the distance input in the log-activity sheet; {unit} is km or miles.

homeUnitMin.desc: Abbreviation for minutes used as a text-field suffix in the log-activity sheet.

homeSleepFactorsShortQuestion.desc: Section label above the sleep-factor chips in the log-sleep sheet (short variant).

homeSleepNotesHintShort.en: Notes (optional) - e.g., woke once, settled again quickly.
homeSleepNotesHintShort.desc: Notes field hint in the log-sleep sheet.
